evals.description: Skill triggers for a clear hreflang implementation request
evals.prompt: I'm building a site for US, UK, and German markets. How do I set up hreflang tags?

evals.description: Skill triggers for an international URL structure decision
evals.prompt: We're expanding our SaaS to Europe. Should we use ccTLD, subdomains, or subdirectories for our international URLs?

evals.description: Agent produces valid hreflang HTML for a multi-language page
evals.prompt: Write the hreflang link tags for a pricing page that targets US English, British English, German, and French users. The base URL is https://acme.com/pricing/

evals.description: Agent produces valid hreflang XML sitemap entries
evals.prompt: Show me how to implement hreflang in an XML sitemap for English and German versions of my homepage.

evals.description: Agent implements hreflang correctly in Next.js App Router
evals.prompt: How do I add hreflang tags in a Next.js 13 app router project with English and French locale routes?

evals.description: Agent explains URL structure trade-offs with correct domain authority guidance
evals.prompt: What are the SEO pros and cons of using subdirectories vs subdomains for international versions of my site?

evals.description: Agent correctly explains the asymmetric hreflang gotcha
evals.prompt: My hreflang tags seem to be ignored by Google. What are the most common reasons hreflang doesn't work?

evals.description: Agent correctly handles the IP-redirect anti-pattern gotcha
evals.prompt: Our site automatically redirects German IP addresses to example.com/de/ - is that good for SEO?

assertions.value: IP redirect is fine for SEO

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: agent does not invent a hreflang directive type
evals.prompt: Can I use hreflang in a meta tag in the HTML body instead of the head?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: agent uses correct ISO code for UK English
evals.prompt: What hreflang code should I use for the United Kingdom?

evals.description: References load: agent correctly points to hreflang reference file for deep implementation
evals.prompt: I need a complete guide to implementing hreflang including framework examples and debugging. Where should I look?
